title: About Design machine
introduction: This is a creative inspiration tool built for designers, creators, and anyone in need of fresh ideas.
sections: Whether you're experiencing creative block, starting a new project, or simply looking for a spark of inspiration, Design Machine is here to help. The platform offers a collection of design-focused generators and tools made to support both hobby designers and professionals in their creative process.
From random color generators and palette creators to font inspiration, descriptive mood words, and contrast checking tools, every feature is designed to make brainstorming easier and more enjoyable.

The idea behind Design Machine is simple: creativity should feel accessible, playful, and inspiring. Sometimes all it takes is one unexpected color combination, one word, or one typeface to unlock a whole new concept.
